benefits.description: No injection pain on second round despite experiencing pain in first round

side_effects.description: Sting and pain on injection in first round; pain varies by injection site location
Flushing after Ipamorelin + CJC-1295 injection in second round; did not occur in first round but did occur in previous usage before first round

protocol_notes: Second round after 2-week break. First round: injected in side of stomach with minimal pain. Second round: initially injected in side of stomach with no pain; upper thigh injection caused significant pain. Reconstituted with 3ml BAC water (consistent with first round). User suspects body acclimation and injection site location influence pain response.
